h9d1265cega286g46f3gb754gfff2d84a0775: Some coward move, poisonin' our drink. But we'll get them, you'll see.
h35c7907eg9638g47b3ga055g883b1b46ef69: Enjoyin' the view? Lookin' tasty in these new breeches, ain't I?
hfa3f1892g2aa9g472dg8578g1a2dc9c6ebd3: Greetings, your most excellent drow-ness. What do you think of these breeches? Could be a new uniform.
h8a5a3cdfgadc6g4c60g8f94g24d923de2a1f: They look quite fetching on you.
h653bb77egaa8ag424dg8531g3297271ac779: Proper stylish, ain't they? Nicked 'em off this dwarf we're cookin'.
heb190f98gd708g40e5gae35g46d684695e0a: Tasty's not the word. Gruesome, maybe?
hf170a7f5g97f8g4b94g8941ge20e775e2edf: An' I ain't takin' fashion advice from someone with worg-dung on their face.
h8837340egfc37g4553gbf25g1157ca734117: An' I ain't takin' fashion advice from someone who 'as to cut tail-holes in their pants.
h1e85db8dgb9f2g46dfg8a3dga30f777a183f: Mebbe they're a bit loose, but that's cuz I keep myself in shape.
hc129e2dbgbba4g4c5cg8c5cge01ff5f469d2: Not like that chunky dwarf I nicked 'em off.
h650dd640g9febg48e6g8029g4278bc94e9b6: What happened to the rest of him?
hf81d909eg6ef9g4de1ga5b7g5c95494406c0: That's him, on the spit! Pleny of him to go around once he's cooked.
h99d5596eg94d6g4d12gb386gc716fa3790ea: You're talking about my kin. Show some respect.
hab827622g947cg4690ga06dgb5d1ac2d9bf1: Don't take it personal. If my mate Grikka was dead and I woz hungry, I'd eat 'im.
h4b65ec47ge197g474dgb0efgcb96d25f0129: Bet he'd taste real good, too.
h2e907230g9116g4fb9gb71dg2e23b2369dd9: The dwarf - did he have anything on him? Besides pants.
h7b9c71a2ge28fg46aag9b32gba6eac14c1ba: Dunno. Woz already stripped down to his breeches when I got my hands on 'im.
h6a218fd3gc973g45fbga36bge9432de12dc2: Had a coupla coins in the pockets and some daft poem. But that's all.
h6252155fg9b16g493bgaf3ag5507de59fae9: Do you make a habit of eating dwarves?
hbabe70c8g84d6g4ef4g85c5g912b84d65071: S'good meat if you can get it. Better than bloody chicken anyhow.
ha89cb0fdgfbf7g411dgb0cdg1ce198585c7a: Shame he was as poor as a chicken.
h960efd86g78e4g4e0bgbed7gbc24ddf20037: Nuffin' in his pants except a coupla coins and some lousy poem.
h940adc01gf388g4cfcgaf63gad3820d347e3: I love poetry - can I see?
hd4c76576g95d2g4515g9bb0g6818608b7a27: Of course! I'm thinking of selling it - reckon it's worth anything, boss?
h94b5c5ceg8163g43e7g9750g71f69ecfdeee: Sure you can. But a look's all yer gettin'.
h78fd6397ge91bg4ac0ga13bgd3f9cd1340c4: For all I know, this little roaster was some famous bard and you'll be sellin' his last words for a pretty penny.
h76d2eaeag0e6fg404bg932ag6fc34863dc7a: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
h6f828506g051cg48dega893gdc4686e07afe: Ah, you're a secret poetry-lover. How cute.
hc8e8a38eg96d1g4922gb819ga8370c4ea27c: Wot? It's a load of old bollocks... all this moons and stars rubbish. Embarrassin' is wot it is.
hee0540aegf18cg46begaecage10f3bb8a797: It's soft-stuff. Don't want nothin' to do with it.
hdee5d620g8db7g4c4bgade1gf254c777b520: I dunno. But it must be worth sumfin'.
hfb89eb80g0aa8g4f5bg9dabg18f106253b00: Don't you know? That's Piltrid the Warbler, the worst bard in Faerûn.
h2071b0d5gd5bdg4549ga099gaae59645ee5c: I think I know him. That's Piltrid the Warbler, the worst bard in Faerûn.
haecc3658g3ccdg4e98ga32cgec1114a93cdf: You're wasting your time. Dwarven poetry is worthless.
h9a0f1c6ege204g4872g868ag99dfff464738: Really? Ah, shite. You might as well use it as bog roll then.
hd922f12ege581g4190g90b9g2c766e7d6eda: I'll get back to tendin' the meat.
h9612a3f6g868fg4288g95adg31f290e95d81: Hang on. I can't find the bloody thing. Somebody's robbed it!
h8ddd120dgd910g4179gb1f0g8dd1c43dcbee: I dunno. It rhymes an' everythin'. Reckon that's gotta be worth sumthin'.
hd8d44dcbgf902g436eg845dge555b9b7648b: He's one of my clan. Piltrid the Warbler, worst bard in Faerûn.
hdd509ae0gb3f0g43c4g90f1g53f6ad86c23b: Really? S'pose it don't matter that somebody already nicked it then.
h5868a1f7g9e44g4b23g8135g1a62dc5d151a: 'Ow can you recognise 'im with his face burned off? You tryin' to kid me?
h8f8ed43fgf028g4416gae76g34abb7f7b67e: I reckon you know this thing is worth a proper pile of loot. So you better pay up.
h9366241fgf4e1g4e14ga292ga7f84ce1116f: Cheers! Now I can get me a fancy belt and really impress the lads.
he379dd60g07ecg4bf3gbf6cg44d566abfb8f: Some of these words are real pretty. But if the lads find out how much I enjoy it, they'll stick ME on the spit.
h6b4980e7g7fbfg4406gab1ega3ca8ae7f920: What the hells are you doin'? Get out of my head!
h5b556ab9g7311g4c07g91deg785b08273466: I didn't make myself clear. Give it to me now.
h0e1529bagd9c5g4eb1g96e9g0734727294c6: Right you are, boss. Hope you enjoy it.
h22bc2c9bgfbafg4ffdg8890g88d0cb31587c: Er, don't be angry, boss, but I can't find the bloody thing. Someone must have nicked it.
h1d92bd7ag2c69g4f95g9f7cg9e7b4d7a3f06: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
he23c9b0ag61f3g438ag87a5g2057243ecc34: The Absolute does not ask. Certainly not twice.
hc1525dbeg1b9ag4cc8gb4b5gb84521e905c1: Of course! I wouldn't keep nuffin' from the Absolute!
hcc661174g63a0g47f7g963cg4d82e0350e96: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h7eb3039dg781eg4f9ag9bffg29be963a20a4: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
h12638d16g6852g4babg8ac9ga483b00f8e53: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
hc26bc7d5gac69g4a41g89b7gae57ed54c29a: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
hd9d7d190gd27eg49e6g9e21g9510abc44c04: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h7159b343gbd0cg492fga640g5c2af68c59a4: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
ha3bf5d77g3cd9g48c2gb829gc543a0bf9aa1: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
h8a3dcea2g368eg4fc2g837dgca19fe193d5e: Who you tryin' to kid? You want this for yerself. And that means you better cough up some coin.
hd597d6bbgc193g4712g92a7gcff7f135b25a: Hang on. I can't find the bloody thing. Somebody's robbed it!
hca878830g2edfg4b40gbafdg731be6df63bf: Give me enuff to buy a belt an' a fancy hat, an' it's yours.
h89d9d9bdgb6e3g4b67ga713g9e4bec5132d9: Cheers! Now I can get me a fancy belt and really impress the lads.
hf81fd377g34feg44e5gbe95g3abfa2cbc209: If you ain't willin' to pay up, I'll keep it!
h6a6d94b1g5e00g4c33gbf2dg88a7c3570337: The Absolute does not ask. Certainly not twice.
he66dc3bbg219dg43cfga405geedc1fc09db9: *As the symbol glows, power courses through you. Authority.*
hdb0edc7fg9115g4a8agb2a2g3f122573f4ef: Someone else already snagged it. Weren't worth nothin' anyhow.
hac9f1875g7bc2g455dg963dg78510505b162: I'll just take the coin then.
hcab53b27g837cg4f60g85fegdbf94b3a1cc8: You havin' a laugh? I need the money to buy meself a belt.
hc44cf16agaa87g4302gb1cdg88a5a7accc01: How'd you manage to catch a dwarf?
h88f1c803gf825g4b00g8ae6g7ecd15d4b0d4: Daft bastard came to us! An' I'd been prayin' for a square meal...
h632d06a9g8051g41ceg8b02gb77e7f8e6c07: Is that the dwarf who tried to sneak into your camp?
h1e9ff813ga640g48e6g81c1g1263b5e317a9: Silly little whisker-wart came bargin' in 'ere with his mates causin' a ruckus.
h55174fedg701eg4f49ga3f6g36e95c5f1639: Now he's supper. That's wot happens to people that mess with us now we've got th'Absolute on our side.
h18a17383g4963g44e4g97eeg18b6978d2c94: Yer just jealous cuz you wished you looked this good.
hfb336113ga5c9g4103g8c20g4f9aa3a92898: Really good pants though, ain't they? I thought so anyhow.
h5b0e67e5ge372g488fg9c64gb5b1ae1562a5: Get any joy out of the poem? Load of nonsense, innit?
h48ad7e65ga39dg4c90g8060gead27ec3ac6b: Get any joy out of the poem? Load of nonsense, innit?
h7f7633d0g0dd1g4ecbg8bebg1e177613fa16: Somethin' about the moon... an' stars?
hb00bceb9gde5ag4587gbe9eg684a7750e3be: Maybe I just ain't got the brains for it... but that dwarf poem don't make sense.
he69a521bg1ec2g4174g90a1g77a7806ae946: You look smart. Reckon it's worth anything?
had92c1a7g1c60g4014gb823gd46ac54c7a5e: Get a good whiff of the meat - crackling up real nice, innit?
